steps.title: Find the slope from the table
steps.content:
Using the table points $(0,38)$ and $(1,43)$, the slope is:
$$m=\frac{43-38}{1-0}=5$$

steps.title: Use the intercept
steps.content: The table includes the point $(0,38)$, so the $y$-intercept is $38$.

steps.title: Write the linear function
steps.content:
Combine the slope and intercept:
$$f(x)=5x+38$$
The answer is B.
